name: Iowa Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cream Style corn (16.5 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, fry the bacon until lightly browned. Remove and set aside.
2. Pour 1/8 to 1/4 cup of the bacon drippings over the bread crumbs. Set aside.
3. Discard all but 2 tablespoons of remaining drippings. Sauté onion and green pepper until tender.
4. Stir in corn and bacon. Spoon into a 1 quart baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with crumbs. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until bubbly and heated through.
6. Yield: 6-8 servings.
